functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Tree Golem Notes
pages:
Tree Golem Notes

A Choascraft guide for tree golem lore, redwood drops, and the craft value of living timber.

Lore

Tree golems are old redwood anger shaped into walking bark. They guard places where roots remember harm.

Fact 1

Forests protect themselves in quiet ways: shade, roots, chemicals, and regrowth. A golem is the loud version.

Fact 2

Redwood wood is tied to endurance. In Choascraft, that endurance can stand up and swing back.

Choascraft Tree Golems

Tree golems are redwood guardians. Their loot table gives more redwood logs than heartwood.

Drops

Tree golems drop Redwood Logs and can also drop a Redwood Sapling.

Crafting Uses

Use redwood drops for the full redwood block set: planks, stairs, slabs, doors, trapdoors, fences, gates, buttons, sticks, and pressure plates.

Building Note

A tree golem is a fight, but also a warning: if you need redwood, plant saplings after taking logs.

Field Note

The golem has no mouth, but every footstep says the same thing: leave some forest standing.
